title: Solver identity (v1)
description: Identity card for a registered solver tier. The combination of (name, version, source) uniquely identifies a solver across the platform's archive.

version.description: Semver-or-equivalent version of this solver's implementation.

hardware.description: Target hardware identifier or null for hardware-agnostic / exact solvers (e.g. 'cuda:0:rtx5070ti', 'cpu').

parameter_schema.description: JSON-schema-style description of accepted sample()-time keyword arguments.
